raw_source.title: [remote] PortalGate is looking for zk engineer
raw_source.body:
## About
Portal Gate is a DeFi protocol that offers dark pool trading with an integrated compliance solution which has the potential to revolutionize the financial industry

## Responsibilities
Role: 
- Developing and writing new zk circuits in Noir
- Writing good technical documentation
- Working with product team to understand user needs and architecting privacy settlement layer solutions 

## Requirements
Skills:
- Competent in development using Rust and Solidity 
- 3 years+  experience in smart contract development  
- Very detail orientated
- 2 yrs+ development in DeFi preferred
- Interest in zero knowledge and privacy

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: full-time
- Remote or not: remote

## Salary and Benefits
salary + tokens

## Work Location
remote

## Contact
admin@portalgate.me

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
